soc2.title: SOC 2
soc2.description: AICPA Trust Service Criteria — evidence generated from this workspace's live configuration and audit trail.

iso27001.title: ISO 27001
iso27001.description: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A controls — evidence generated from this workspace's live configuration and audit trail.

gdpr.description: GDPR Article 17 (right-to-erasure) requests. Each request enters a 30-day grace window before the background purge job redacts PII while preserving audit references.

infoBanner.title: Right-to-erasure runs an async background purge.
infoBanner.description: Requests are recorded with a 30-day grace window; the purge job then redacts PII while preserving the tamper-evident audit trail.

list.title: Erasure requests
list.empty: No GDPR erasure requests on file.

create.title: File erasure request
create.description: Starts the 30-day grace window. The user is not deleted yet — cancel before grace expires to abort.
create.userIdHelp: UUID of the user to erase. Copy from the Users page.
create.reasonHelp: Optional but strongly recommended for audit-trail purposes.

evidence.emptyDescription: Click "Generate evidence" to run a live control check against this workspace's configuration and audit trail.

controls.title: Controls
controls.empty: No controls in this evidence run.

history.title: Report history
history.count_one: {{count}} run — select a row to load its controls above.
history.count_other: {{count}} runs — select a row to load its controls above.

retention.description: How long deleted data is kept before it's permanently purged. Retention runs automatically once enabled; you can also preview or run it on demand.

deletedUsers.title: Soft-deleted users
deletedUsers.description: Permanently purge users that have been in the recycle bin longer than the window.
deletedUsers.automaticPurgeHelp: A background job purges ripe users hourly when enabled.
deletedUsers.windowHelp: Users soft-deleted longer ago than this are purged. 1–3650 days.
deletedUsers.purgeConfirmDescription: This purges all soft-deleted users older than the retention window. This cannot be undone.
deletedUsers.previewResult_one: {{count}} user would be purged at the current {{days}}-day window.
deletedUsers.previewResult_other: {{count}} users would be purged at the current {{days}}-day window.

otherDataClasses.title: Other data classes
otherDataClasses.description: Audit logs are append-only and retained for the compliance window; session and event retention are managed by the platform. Configurable per-class policies are on the roadmap.
